A Tennessee Take
- on Global Tastes -
THE WHISKEY’S FLOWING
Thistle & Rye is a casual, chic cocktail bar on the third floor of Conrad Nashville offering avant-garde cocktails and small plates inspired by global street food.
Hours
Thistle & Rye
Sunday through Thursday |
4:00 pm - 10:00 pm
Friday and Saturday |
4:00 pm - 11:00 pm
Please note Thistle & Rye will be closed for maintenance from July 27–31
Slide 1 of 1
Happy Hour With a View
Happy Hour daily from 4:00 pm to 6:00 pm
Drink in the sights and sounds of Nashville’s downtown cityscape while savoring local, small-batch whiskeys and avant-garde cocktails. Our indoor-outdoor bar offers a refreshing vantage point overlooking Music City.
A COCKTAIL JOURNEY FROM PROHIBITION TO MODERN DAY
Private Gatherings
Whether celebrating a special occasion or having a lively night out, Thistle & Rye sets the scene for inspired events.
Make a Reservation
